imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Clean, simple renewable energy icon with sun rays, wind turbine blade, or leaf symbol in green and yellow tones suitable for favicon display (favicon.dim_32x32.png)

existing_features.title: Generate a favicon logo that represents renewable energy themes (such as sun, wind, water, or leaf elements) suitable for display in browser tabs
Update frontend/index.html to reference the generated favicon file in the <head> section with proper link tags for different sizes
